## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew build` is green (compiles, tests pass, formatting verified)
- [ ] `./gradlew spotlessApply` leaves no diff
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavioural change
- [ ] `tablist-core` still imports no `org.bukkit` / `io.papermc`
- [ ] The non-spam contract (`StaticConfigNoSpamTest`) still passes
